title: Scanner Input
description: Create an interactive program that reads a user's name and greets them.
problemStatement:
To get user input, Java uses the `Scanner` class. Import `java.util.Scanner`, then create a scanner linked to `System.in`. Ask the user for their name and print `"Welcome to Progly, "` followed by their name.

**Requirement:** Use `scanner.nextLine()` to capture the input.
hints: Include `import java.util.Scanner;` at the very top of your file.
Close the scanner at the end with `scanner.close();`.
